message:
feat(cli): Implement fastmcp dev command with hot reloading

- bd-7eq: Development mode with file watching
- File watching using notify crate
- Auto-rebuild on .rs/.toml file changes
- Auto-restart after successful build
- Debouncing to prevent rapid restarts
- Colored console output with status icons
- Options: --no-reload, --clear, --debounce, --verbose, --env

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
